name: Ashen (Greater)
description: In his attempts to recreate the initial feeling of the object he encountered ages ago, the Ash Engineer discovered a different effect, one that would confound his enemies. Ashen weapons are typically coated in a thin layer of ash that gradually returns over the span of a day, even after wiping away. A creature hit by an attack from an ashen weapon becomes surrounded by burning ash, which deals ] damage. This ash clouds the senses, causing the creature to become for 1 round unless it succeeds at a save. On a critical failure, the effect lasts for 1 minute.
